response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the Japanese song 'Maru Maru Mori Mori!'. Dialogue segments featuring Kobo Kanaeru's 'baby' persona and Mori Calliope's reactions were transcribed directly from the audio. Reference JSON lyrics were utilized for the performance segment, with timestamps strictly aligned to the vocal delivery. Translation accounts for Kobo's Indonesian exclamation ('Anjing') and the on-screen Japanese feedback at the end of the performance.

subtitles.original: うー！あうー！うー！ぶーじゅー！ぶーじゅー！ぶーじゅー！ぶー！
subtitles.english: Ugh! Auu! Ugh! Boojoo! Boojoo! Boojoo! Boo!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay. I see. You're in training so that you can be an idol, so that you can talk normally.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. I see. You're in training so that you can be an idol, so that you can talk normally.

subtitles.original: あうー！あうあうー！あー！
subtitles.english: Auu! Au auu! Ah!

subtitles.original: Naruhodo. Okay. So you can still dance and like, sing just fine but no talking?
subtitles.english: I see. Okay. So you can still dance and like, sing just fine but no talking?

subtitles.original: あー！うごっ！
subtitles.english: Ah! Ugoh!

subtitles.original: Oh, okay. Well, maybe you need to perform with Dada.
subtitles.english: Oh, okay. Well, maybe you need to perform with Dada.

subtitles.original: だ…だ…だ…だ…だ…
subtitles.english: Da... da... da... da... da...

subtitles.original: Oh, okay, okay. Say: Dada.
subtitles.english: Oh, okay, okay. Say: Dada.

subtitles.original: だ…だ…だ…ダダー！
subtitles.english: Da... da... da... Dada!

subtitles.original: Jesus Christ... Okay! All right, all right. You know what? Let's just... let's take it slow, okay? Let's take it slow.
subtitles.english: Jesus Christ... Okay! All right, all right. You know what? Let's just... let's take it slow, okay? Let's take it slow.

subtitles.original: あー！ぐーぐーがーがー！あー！
subtitles.english: Ah! Gugu gaga! Ah!

subtitles.original: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ みんな食べるよ
subtitles.english: Maru Maru Mori Mori! Everyone eat up!

subtitles.original: ツル・ツル・テカ・テカ 明日も晴れるかな
subtitles.english: Tsuru Tsuru Teka Teka, I wonder if it will be sunny tomorrow

subtitles.original: ダバデュア ダバジャバ 忘れ物するなよ
subtitles.english: Daba-dua daba-jaba, don't forget anything!

subtitles.original: ダバデュア ダバジャバ デュア 大きくなったら
subtitles.english: Daba-dua daba-jaba-dua, when I grow up...

subtitles.original: お空に声が届くかな？
subtitles.english: will my voice reach the sky?

subtitles.original: いつまでも一緒だよ
subtitles.english: We'll be together forever.

subtitles.original: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ みんな食べるよ
subtitles.english: Maru Maru Mori Mori! Everyone eat up!

subtitles.original: ツル・ツル・テカ・テカ 明日も晴れるかな
subtitles.english: Tsuru Tsuru Teka Teka, I wonder if it will be sunny tomorrow

subtitles.original: 悲しくて 泣いていた
subtitles.english: I was so sad that I was crying

subtitles.original: ひとり歩く帰り道
subtitles.english: on the way home, walking all alone.

subtitles.original: こんな時 ほんわかな
subtitles.english: At times like this, I want to see...

subtitles.original: みんなに会いたいな
subtitles.english: everyone who's so warm and kind.

subtitles.original: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ おまじないだよ
subtitles.english: Maru Maru Mori Mori! It's a magic spell!

subtitles.original: ツル・ツル・テカ・テカ にっこり笑顔
subtitles.english: Tsuru Tsuru Teka Teka, a beaming smile!

subtitles.original: いちにのさんしで ごましおさん
subtitles.english: One, two, three, four, black sesame salt!

subtitles.original: たくさんだと おいしいね
subtitles.english: It's delicious if there's a lot of it!

subtitles.original: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ ぷかぷかお風呂
subtitles.english: Maru Maru Mori Mori! Floating in the bath!

subtitles.original: ツル・ツル・ピカ・ピカ ゴシゴシブラシ
subtitles.english: Tsuru Tsuru Pika Pika, scrubbing with a brush!

subtitles.original: 皆さん今晩は また明日
subtitles.english: Good evening, everyone! See you tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 朝ご飯は何でしょうね
subtitles.english: I wonder what's for breakfast?

subtitles.original: ダバデュア ダバジャバ...
subtitles.english: Daba-dua daba-jaba...

subtitles.original: 大人になっても 虹色の
subtitles.english: Even when we grow up,

subtitles.original: 夢を描こうね
subtitles.english: let's keep drawing our rainbow dreams.

subtitles.original: 指切りして 照れりんこ
subtitles.english: Make a pinky promise, feeling a bit shy!

subtitles.original: お星様 綺麗だね
subtitles.english: The stars are so beautiful, aren't they?

subtitles.original: 手をつないで 願い事
subtitles.english: Hold hands and make a wish!

subtitles.original: たとえ遠くに いても
subtitles.english: Even if we're far apart,

subtitles.original: 心はひとつだよ
subtitles.english: our hearts are as one.

subtitles.original: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ 幸せ元気
subtitles.english: Maru Maru Mori Mori! Happy and energetic!

subtitles.original: テクテク トコトコ 前に進むよ
subtitles.english: Step by step, we'll keep moving forward.

subtitles.original: いちにのさんしで ホームラン
subtitles.english: One, two, three, four, home run!

subtitles.original: 愛がいっぱい ランドセル
subtitles.english: A school backpack full of love!

subtitles.original: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ 大きくなるよ
subtitles.english: Maru Maru Mori Mori! We're growing big!

subtitles.original: ドキドキ ワクワク ドアを開けるよ
subtitles.english: With excitement, we'll open the door!

subtitles.original: 皆さんしっかり また明日
subtitles.english: Stay strong, everyone! See you tomorrow.

subtitles.original: もっと素敵な日になる
subtitles.english: It's going to be an even more wonderful day.

subtitles.original: ダダー！アンジン！
subtitles.english: Dada! Anjing!

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, you like Anjing too? That's nice.
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, you like Anjing too? That's nice.

subtitles.original: 大好きだよ
subtitles.english: I love you so much!

subtitles.original: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ さあ歌いましょう
subtitles.english: Maru Maru Mori Mori! Now let's sing!

subtitles.original: ツル・ツル・テカ・テカ にっこり笑顔
subtitles.english: Tsuru Tsuru Teka Teka, a beaming smile!

subtitles.original: いちにのさんしで ごましおさん
subtitles.english: One, two, three, four, black sesame salt!

subtitles.original: たくさんだと おいしいね
subtitles.english: It's delicious if there's a lot of it!

subtitles.original: マル・マル・モリ・モリ！ ぷかぷかお風呂
subtitles.english: Maru Maru Mori Mori! Floating in the bath!

subtitles.original: ツル・ツル・ピカ・ピカ ゴシゴシブラシ
subtitles.english: Tsuru Tsuru Pika Pika, scrubbing with a brush!

subtitles.original: 皆さん今晩は また明日
subtitles.english: Good evening, everyone! See you tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 朝ご飯は何でしょうね
subtitles.english: I wonder what's for breakfast?

subtitles.original: いつもいつも ありがとう
subtitles.english: Always, always, thank you.

subtitles.original: よくできました
subtitles.english: Good job!

subtitles.original: Uh, so... so how was that? How is it now?
subtitles.english: Uh, so... so how was that? How is it now?

subtitles.original: あー！ぐーぐーがーがー！あー！あー！あー！あー！もう！ばぶばぶー！
subtitles.english: Ah! Gugu gaga! Ah! Ah! Ah! Ah! Jeez! Babu babu!

subtitles.original: Still baby, huh? This is weird. Man, the curse should be lifted because you did really, really...
subtitles.english: Still baby, huh? This is weird. Man, the curse should be lifted because you did really, really...
